signals.headline: # Breaking XRP News - April 15, 2026
matched_markets: XRP Up or Down - April 16, 7:20AM-7:25AM ET

signals.headline: Record ETF Inflows Signal Institutional Demand | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Record ETF Inflows Signal Institutional Demand | YES | HIGH confidence**

U.S. spot XRP ETFs attracted $119.6 million in inflows on April 14—the strongest single-day intake since December 2025.[1] This demonstrates renewed institutional buying pressure and direct market demand for XRP exposure.
matched_markets: XRP Up or Down - April 16, 7:20AM-7:25AM ET

signals.headline: Rakuten Integration Expands Retail Utility | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Integration Expands Retail Utility | YES | HIGH confidence**

Rakuten Wallet integrated XRP into its Rakuten Pay system, enabling its 44 million users to convert XRP into loyalty points.[1] This represents a significant mainstream retail use case beyond speculative trading.

signals.headline: Upcoming Catalyst: SEC CLARITY Act Roundtable (April 16)**
signals.raw:
Upcoming Catalyst: SEC CLARITY Act Roundtable (April 16)**

The Senate Banking Committee is targeting an April 16 SEC roundtable and late-April markup on the CLARITY Act, which would establish XRP's permanent commodity status and provide legal cover for banks to use XRP in cross-border payments.[3] This is considered a critical event for XRP's institutional adoption trajectory.
matched_markets: XRP Up or Down - April 16, 7:20AM-7:25AM ET

signals.headline: SEC Clarifies Crypto Interface Rules, Benefiting XRPL's Native DEX | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Clarifies Crypto Interface Rules, Benefiting XRPL's Native DEX | YES | HIGH confidence**

The SEC released roundtable guidance today clarifying rules for cryptocurrency interfaces, with potential benefits for the XRP Ledger's native decentralized exchange.[1] This regulatory clarity could reduce legal uncertainty for platforms facilitating XRP trading and settlement.

signals.headline: Technical Breakout Watch: XRP Price at Critical Inflection Point | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Technical Breakout Watch: XRP Price at Critical Inflection Point | YES | HIGH confidence**
